tasks.subject: Task 1: musicPlayer restoreSession + resumeOrRestart
tasks.description: Add restoreSession (boot restore, no autoplay) + resumeOrRestart (rail play: playing->pause, paused->resume, exhausted->restart from 0) to musicPlayer. TDD. Files: app/src/lib/music/musicPlayer.svelte.ts, app/tests/unit/music/musicPlayer.test.ts. Verify: cd app && npm run test -- musicPlayer && npm run check

tasks.subject: Task 2: musicSession persistence module + +layout install
tasks.description: Create app/src/lib/music/musicSession.svelte.ts (save/load snapshot to localStorage + installMusicSession with $effect.root restore+persist), wire into app/src/routes/+layout.svelte. Test app/tests/unit/music/musicSession.test.ts. Verify: cd app && npm run test -- musicSession && npm run check

tasks.subject: Task 3: RailMusicControls.svelte + rail mount
tasks.description: Create app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/RailMusicControls.svelte (always-visible prev/play/next, disabled when no session, play=resumeOrRestart), mount in SidePanel rail between workspace-switcher and rail-chips. Verify: cd app && npm run check

tasks.subject: Task 4: RailNowPlaying.svelte (10min timeout) + .main mount
tasks.description: Create app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/RailNowPlaying.svelte (title+note name+seek, visible when track loaded, 10min paused timeout auto-hide), mount in SidePanel .main between header and list. Verify: cd app && npm run check

tasks.subject: Task 5: remove floating DesktopMiniPlayer
tasks.description: Delete app/src/lib/editor/musicNote/DesktopMiniPlayer.svelte, remove its mount+import in DesktopWorkspace.svelte, remove desktopMiniPlayerVisible from miniPlayerVisibility.ts + its tests (keep mobile miniPlayerVisible). Verify: cd app && npm run test -- miniPlayerVisibility && npm run check

tasks.subject: Task 6: settings guide card update
tasks.description: Update settings guide music-note card: split mini-player item into mobile (pill) + desktop (rail split, always-visible controls, info above list, reload restore, 10min collapse, no stop). File: app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte. Verify: cd app && npm run check
